title: Huawei QSFP-40G-LR4L-eKit, QSFP+ optical module, Single-Mode, 2km, 40G, LC
description: Huawei QSFP-40G-LR4L-eKit is a single-mode QSFP+ module with a maximum throughput of 40Gbps , 4 channels, wavelengths 1271nm, 1291nm, 1311nm, 1331nm and two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 2km . The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP+ For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 40 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1271 to 1331 Distance [km] 2 Transfer type 2-fiber Tx power [dBm] 9 up to 2.3 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 10.5 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
